title: Source Manifest Schema
description: Schema for source_manifest.json in curated real NBA snapshots. Defines source metadata, freshness governance, licensing, and validation tracking. Must not contain any execution, mutation, live-data, or logo-branding fields. M10-E2 patch: adds player_identities and roster_memberships as allowed future data_categories; adds per-file source_type/manual_review_required/live_eligible/data_freshness_warning/limitations fields; tightens forbidden categories and field names (contracts/salaries/cap_sheets/injuries/rumors/live_status/latest_roster).

schema_version.description: Source manifest schema version, e.g. m10-b-v1

snapshot_type.description: Snapshot type classification. Must NOT be 'live' or 'realtime'.

as_of_date.description: Data cutoff date in YYYY-MM-DD format

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when snapshot was generated

source_name.description: Primary data source name, e.g. Spotrac 2025-26 contract/cap table

source_url.description: Source URL if publicly available, otherwise null

source_reference.description: Source reference (publication name, page title) when no direct URL is available

license_notes.description: License and usage terms for this snapshot

freshness_label.description: Human-readable freshness label, e.g. Pre-offseason freeze (as of 2026-06-25)

freshness_policy.description: Explanation of why this snapshot is not live/current and whether it satisfies the four live prerequisites (authorization, timestamp, auto-refresh, freshness policy)

live_eligible.description: Whether this snapshot is eligible to be called live/current. Must be false in M10.

stale_after_date.description: Date after which UI must show an additional stale warning; null if no explicit expiration

data_freshness_warning.description: Warning text directly consumable by UI, intelligence_summary, and agent_trace

limitations.description: List of data limitations and caveats

data_categories.description: Data categories included in this snapshot; may be empty for placeholder fixtures before data is loaded. Contracts/salaries/cap_sheets are FORBIDDEN in M10-E (deferred to M10-F or later). Injuries/scouting/rumors/live-status/current/latest are forbidden at any stage.

source_type.description: Provenance classification. 'llm_generated' and 'scraped_unreviewed' are forbidden and must not be added.

manual_review_required.description: Per-file manual-review flag. All real player/roster data must set this to true.

live_eligible.description: Per-file live eligibility; must be false if present.

per_file_sources.description: Per-file source tracking because teams/player_identities/roster_memberships/contracts/cap_sheets may come from different sources; may be empty for placeholder fixtures. M10-E2: extended with optional per-file source_type / manual_review_required / live_eligible / data_freshness_warning / limitations to support future player/roster lineage. Entries for player_identities/roster_memberships must supply these governance fields.

allowed_usage.description: Allowed usage terms, e.g. non-commercial demonstration, internal review

redistribution_notes.description: Redistribution restrictions and notes, important for GitHub publication

file_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes for each normalized file to detect tampering; may be empty for placeholder fixtures

replaces_snapshot_id.description: Previous snapshot_id this version replaces, or null if first version

reviewed_by.description: Reviewer identifier for auditability of validation_status

manual_review_required.description: Whether manual review is required; must be consistent with manifest.json

propertyNames.description: Forbidden field names: execution verbs, live/current/latest hints, logo asset references, salary/injury/scouting/rumor fields (deferred to M10-F+ or permanently forbidden).
